description:
If you're considering health or term insurance, then book a FREE call with our top advisors. Get spam-free, high-quality advice tailored just for you - https://ditto.sh/7df3ji

In today's video, we review ICICI Lombard's brand-new Elevate Health Insurance plan. With over 20+ fancy add-ons and features, this plan is making sound in the market. Whether you're considering upgrading your current policy or looking for comprehensive coverage for the first time, you won't want to miss this detailed breakdown!

Key Takeaways:
1. Discover the extensive coverage options and what makes Elevate stand out.
2. Get to know some add-ons that offer extra layers of protection and customization.
3. Analysis of whether these add-ons are worth the extra cost.
4. Insights into the claims process and how this plan aims to make it seamless.
5. Premiums Comparison with other top players
5. Ditto's verdict on who should consider this plan.

Don't miss out on this in-depth review that could help you make an informed decision about your health insurance needs!

If you found this video helpful, don't forget to like, share it with friends and family, and subscribe to our channel for more expert insights on insurance and financial planning. 

Thank you for watching, and stay tuned for more from Ditto! 

Happy Insurance Hunting

comments.text:
Agar kisi ko policy lene se pehle autism hai, toh ICICI us case ko underwriting ke through assess karegi — yani company decide karegi ki policy issue karni hai ya nahi.
Agar policy mil jaati hai, toh autism ek pre-existing condition ke roop mein count hoga, aur waiting period complete hone ke baad agar autism ke wajah se hospitalisation hoti hai, toh voh cover ho jaayegi.

comments.text: What do you mean by life time ke liye ek claim cover hoga unlimited.. Sum insured ke sath
comments.author: @TravelwithShash

comments.text:
The "Infinite Care" add-on in the ICICI Elevate health insurance policy ensures that for one claim in a lifetime, there is no upper limit on the medical expenses, even if the sum insured is exhausted.

Example:
Let's say you have a health insurance policy with a sum insured of ₹10 lakh. You also have the Infinite Care add-on.

In a particular year, you undergo a major surgery and require extensive hospitalization, resulting in a medical bill of ₹50 lakh.
Normally, your policy would cover only ₹10 lakh (your sum insured), and you would have to pay the remaining ₹40 lakh out of pocket.
However, with the Infinite Care add-on, the insurer will cover the full ₹50 lakh for this one-time claim, regardless of your sum insured.
This benefit applies once in a lifetime under the policy. For other claims, the sum insured limits will still apply.
